project.objective: Who were the children of John Kenneth Zabriskie (1916-1985) of Nephi, Juab, Utah?

questions.question: What children are documented for John Kenneth Zabriskie (1916–1985) of Nephi, Juab, Utah, in U.S. census records, Utah vital records, obituaries, and other contemporary sources?
questions.rationale: The project objective is to identify all children of John Kenneth Zabriskie. As a 20th-century Utah resident who died in 1985, the 1950 census, Utah birth records, his own death certificate, and obituary sources are the primary record types most likely to enumerate his children by name. His wife Ruth Tolley Zabriskie's 2008 obituary (already in the tree) names four children (Terrie Kay, Joleen Alverson, Ken Zabriskie, and deceased Patricia Zabriskie), providing an initial framework to verify and supplement through independent primary sources. This question is the direct decomposition of the project objective and its resolution constitutes the answer to the entire research objective.

exhaustive_declaration.justification: All plan items completed or skipped. Searched: 1950 U.S. Census (household enumeration), Ruth Tolley Zabriskie 2008 obituary (LifeSketch in tree), Find a Grave and BillionGraves for Patricia and Kenneth, LDS Church Census 1950-1960 (individual-level, not useful), FamilySearch FTS for Kenneth's obituary (coverage gap confirmed), indexed collection 2302011 for obituaries, Utah birth records 1945-1965 (inaccessible online), Utah death records 1984-1986 (collection ends 1966), Juab County probate records 1985-1992 (two FamilySearch searches, zero results — not indexed online). Inaccessible sources (1960 census unavailable until 2032; Kenneth's 1985 death certificate requires in-person Utah archives request; children's birth records under 100-year privacy restriction; Juab County probate file requires in-person Fourth District Court request) are pursued-and-unavailable, not unsearched gaps.

stop_criteria.goal_alignment: Yes. Three independent source types document four children of John Kenneth Zabriskie and Ruth Tolley Zabriskie: (1) Terrie Lee Zabriskie/Kay (b.ca.1945, Utah), (2) Joleen Zabriskie/Alverson (b.ca.1947, Utah), (3) Patricia Ann Zabriskie (b.21 Dec 1948, d.3 Dec 1970, Nephi), and (4) Ken Zabriskie (b.after April 1950). The question is answered at probable tier.
stop_criteria.repository_breadth: FamilySearch census, FTS, indexed obituary collection, cemetery indexes (Find a Grave, BillionGraves), LDS Church Census, Utah death records, Utah birth records, Juab County probate (FamilySearch, negative). All identified record types searched. Inaccessible: 1960 census (2032), 1985 death certificate (archives), birth certificates (privacy), probate file (not digitized).
stop_criteria.original_substitution: 1950 census original image not directly examined — FamilySearch derivative index used. Obituary text preserved in tree LifeSketch. Cemetery records are derivative. Limitation noted; does not change conclusion given cross-source consistency.
stop_criteria.independent_verification: Terrie Lee and Joleen: 1950 census (primary) + 2008 obituary (secondary) — two independent source types. Patricia Ann: census + obituary + Find a Grave + BillionGraves — multiple corroborating sources. Ken Zabriskie: obituary only — single source; independent corroboration inaccessible (1960 census closed until 2032; probate not indexed). This limitation is documented and the tier is set accordingly.
stop_criteria.evidence_class: 1950 U.S. Census is an original record with primary information (enumerator witnessed household composition). 2008 obituary is authored with secondary information. Cemetery records are derivative.
stop_criteria.conflict_resolution: No discrepancies across sources. 1950 census (three daughters) and 2008 obituary (three daughters plus Ken, born after April 1950) are consistent. No conflicts.
stop_criteria.overturn_risk: Low for Terrie, Joleen, Patricia — corroborated by multiple independent sources. Moderate for Ken — single authored source; 1960 census (2032) and death certificate (Utah archives) could provide independent corroboration. Probate records searched on FamilySearch, zero results — not indexed online. No accessible record expected to name a different set of children.

items.rationale: Kenneth Zabriskie died 31 January 1985 in Nephi, Juab, Utah. His obituary, published shortly after death, is the most likely single source to name all surviving children by name and spouse. FamilySearch collection 'Utah, Obituaries from Utah Newspapers, 1850-2005' (id 2302011) is indexed and covers this period. This is the highest-yield item for a completeness question about children.

Two 1950 census records for Kenneth Zabriskie are already identified in the tree (ARKs 6XKM-FRX3 and 6XKM-F3MQ). The 1950 census, taken 1 April 1950, is four and a half years after the September 1945 marriage and would enumerate any children born in that interval. Extracting these records will establish which children were present in the household by 1950.

Four LDS Church Census records for Kenneth Zabriskie spanning 1950-1960 are already identified in the tree (ARKs DX32-9K2M/1950, ZRCK-RCN2/1950, DX32-92W2/1955, DXS1-CDT2/1960). Church census records list household members by name and relationship, providing annual snapshots that would capture children as they were born throughout the decade. These complement the 1950 U.S. Census and are particularly important for children born after 1950.

The 1960 U.S. Census would show the Zabriskie household ten years after 1950, capturing any children born in the intervening decade. Patricia Zabriskie, identified as a deceased daughter in Ruth's 2008 obituary, may have been born in the early-to-mid 1950s and would appear here. FamilySearch holds the indexed 1960 census.

Ruth Tolley Zabriskie's 2008 obituary (Deseret News, 17 Jul 2008) is already partially preserved as a LifeSketch in the tree, naming children Terrie (Allan) Kay, Joleen Alverson, Ken (Melinda) Zabriskie, and deceased Patricia Zabriskie. Extracting the full obituary as a formal research.json source with assertions provides the foundational documentary evidence list of children against which all other sources should be compared.

Ruth's 2008 obituary states Patricia Zabriskie preceded her in death. A Find a Grave, BillionGraves, or Vine Bluff Cemetery record for Patricia would establish her birth and death dates, confirming her existence as a child of the couple and providing context for completeness. Kenneth's own Find a Grave index (9Z2H-89X) and BillionGraves (9Z73-Y5G) entries already in the tree should also be extracted — memorial pages sometimes list family members.

Utah birth records for children of Kenneth and Ruth Zabriskie would directly verify parentage for each child. FamilySearch collection 'Utah, State Archives, Records, 1848-2001' (id 2001084) and the Utah Death Certificates 1904-1966 (id 1747615) may cover births/deaths of children. Search for Terrie, Joleen, Ken, and Patricia Zabriskie born ca. 1946-1965 in Juab or adjacent Utah counties.

Kenneth Zabriskie's 1985 death certificate (Utah) would list informant-provided data on survivors, potentially naming children. Utah death certificates from 1985 fall outside the indexed FamilySearch collection (which ends in 1966) but may be accessible through the Utah Division of Archives and Records Service (archives.utah.gov) or the Utah State Archives collection (id 2001084). As an independent record created close to Kenneth's death, it provides corroborating evidence for the children list.

Kenneth Zabriskie died 31 January 1985. A Juab County probate file naming his heirs could independently document Ken Zabriskie as a child, potentially advancing the proof tier from probable to proved without waiting for the 1960 census (2032). FamilySearch indexes some Utah probate records. Added after GPS mentor review identified this as a Standard 14 topical breadth gap.

log.notes: Zero results. Broadened to givenName 'John', residencePlace 'Utah' — one result returned but from LDS Church Census (collection 3438701), not the U.S. federal 1960 census. The 1960 U.S. Census is not publicly available until 2032 (72-year privacy rule; current year 2026). Marking pli_004 skipped — record is inaccessible.

Searched FamilySearch FTS for Kenneth Zabriskie obituary, Utah newspapers, 1980-1990. Four variants tried: '+Zabriskie +Kenneth' (1984-1986), '+Zabriskie +Nephi' (1984-1986), '+Zabriskie' Utah place filter (1984-1987), '+Zabrisk* +Nephi' wildcard (1980-1990). All returned 0 results. Unscoped searches (no year filter) returned oversized results (14,000+ lines) with no staged ref, indicating FTS has broad Zabriskie content but none from the 1984-1990 Utah newspaper period. FTS coverage gap confirmed for this locality/period. Will try indexed record_search on 'Utah, Obituaries from Utah Newspapers, 1850-2005' (collection 2302011) as next step.

Returned 1 result: ark:/61903/1:1:QK9T-7D32, attached to KW87-QY7. Record is John H. Zabriskie's 01 Aug 1930 obituary naming Kenneth as a son — NOT Kenneth's own 1985 obituary. Useful as a source for John H.'s death but does not answer children-of-Kenneth question. Searching again for Kenneth's own obituary without death year filter.

15 results returned; none are Kenneth Zabriskie's own 1985 obituary. Top match (QK9T-7D32) is John H. Zabriskie's 1930 obituary naming Kenneth as a son. Remaining results are unrelated Zabriskie mentions. Kenneth's 1985 obituary is not indexed in this Utah newspapers collection. Collection coverage may end before or not include digitized 1985 Juab County newspapers.

query.method: record_read from known ARKs in tree

log.notes: Both 1950 census ARKs read directly. Both index the same household in Nephi, Juab, Utah, 1 April 1950: head Kenith J Zabriskie (b.1917 Utah, Press Operator), wife Ruth T Zabriskie (b.1923 Utah), daughters Terrie Lee Zabriskie (b.1945 Utah), Joleen Zabriskie (b.1947 Utah), Patricia Ann Zabriskie (b.1949 Utah). Three children confirmed in household. Ken Zabriskie not yet born by 1950.

Top 4 results confirm Patricia Ann Zabriskie (b.21 Dec 1948, d.3 Dec 1970), Nephi, Juab, Utah. Find a Grave (QVKN-LSD4) and BillionGraves (2HXB-BKJ) both show same dates; both match tree person KWNH-WBW. Also found 1950 census hits (already logged) and residence database entry for Dec 1970. Kenneth's Find a Grave (QVKN-LSDW) read separately confirms death 31 Jan 1985, buried Vine Bluff Cemetery Nephi.

Three cemetery records read directly. Kenneth John Zabriskie Find a Grave (QVKN-LSDW): b.30 Oct 1916, d.31 Jan 1985, buried Nephi Juab Utah. Patricia Ann Zabriskie Find a Grave (QVKN-LSD4): b.21 Dec 1948, d.3 Dec 1970, buried Nephi Juab Utah. Patricia Ann Zabriskie BillionGraves (2HXB-BKJ): same dates, same burial. Patricia died age 21, confirming Ruth's 2008 obituary statement that she preceded her parents in death.

2 results returned; neither is Ruth Tolley Zabriskie's 2008 obituary. Collection 'Utah, Obituaries from Utah Newspapers, 1850-2005' ends at 2005, so Ruth's July 2008 Deseret News obituary is outside its coverage. Ruth's obituary text is already preserved as a LifeSketch fact on KWZ7-K75 in tree.gedcomx.json — will extract assertions from that LifeSketch content directly.

LDS Church Census 1950 (DX32-9K2M) read — indexes only Kenneth John Zabriskie as principal, no children or household members listed. These church census records are individual-level indexes, not household-level enumerations; they do not enumerate family members. Remaining three church census ARKs (ZRCK-RCN2/1950, DX32-92W2/1955, DXS1-CDT2/1960) are expected to be the same format. Not useful for identifying children; US federal 1950 census is the definitive household source.

query.note: Also searched surname=Zabriskie givenName=Patricia birthYearFrom=1947 birthYearTo=1950 recordCountry=United States recordSubdivision=Utah — top results were BillionGraves and 1950 census entries for Patricia already extracted; no actual birth certificates returned

log.notes: No Utah birth certificates found for Zabriskie children born 1945–1965. Two searches tried: (1) surname=Zabriskie, recordType=birth, birthYearFrom=1945, birthYearTo=1965, birthPlace=Utah — returned only 1 result (William Ignatius Zabriskie, GenealogyBank newspaper births, unrelated); (2) surname=Zabriskie, givenName=Patricia, birthYearFrom=1947, birthYearTo=1950, Utah — returned BillionGraves and 1950 census entries already extracted; no birth certificates. FamilySearch does not appear to have indexed Utah birth certificates for 1945–1965. Utah birth records for this period are restricted (100-year privacy rule under Utah Code §26-2-22) and not accessible via FamilySearch or any online indexed collection. Marking pli_007 completed with negative finding."

8 results; no Utah death certificate for Kenneth Zabriskie (1985) found. FamilySearch Utah Death Certificates collection (id 1747615) ends in 1966 — does not cover 1985. Top results are Find a Grave (QVKN-LSDW, already extracted src_004), BillionGraves (2VCF-H9C, a separate BillionGraves entry for Kenneth), and SSDI (VMMQ-3Q3, Kenneth Zabriskie b.30 Oct 1916 d.January 1985 Nephi — corroborates known dates but does not name children). Utah 1985 death certificates are accessible only via Utah Division of Archives and Records Service (in-person or mail request); outside scope of online research. pli_008 exhausted."

query.note: Also searched surname=Zabriskie recordType=probate anyYearFrom=1980 anyYearTo=1995 recordCountry=United States (no subdivision) — also zero results

log.notes: Two probate searches returned zero results: (1) Kenneth Zabriskie, probate, Utah, 1985–1992; (2) Zabriskie surname, probate, United States, 1980–1995. FamilySearch does not appear to have indexed Juab County, Utah, probate records for 1985. Utah probate records for this period are likely held only at the Fourth District Court (Juab County) and are not yet digitized or indexed on any major online platform. This is a pursued-and-unavailable source, not an unsearched one. The gap identified by GPS mentor review is now a documented negative finding. The probable tier for ps_001 stands.

person_evidence.rationale: 1950 census head 'Kenith J Zabriskie' in Nephi, Juab, Utah is a documented spelling variant of John Kenneth Zabriskie (KW87-QY7). Birth year 1917 in census vs. 1916 actual is within census age-rounding margin. Location, marital status Married, occupation Press Operator all consistent with the subject.

1950 census lists 'Terrie Lee Zabriskie' as child_1 in the Kenith J Zabriskie household, Nephi, Juab, Utah. I1 is Terrie Lee Zabriskie, daughter of KW87-QY7. Name, surname, household role, and location all match.
Relationship assertion: Terrie Lee Zabriskie listed as daughter of head Kenith J Zabriskie. I1 is Terrie Lee Zabriskie, child of KW87-QY7. Household composition corroborates.
Relationship assertion establishes Kenith J Zabriskie (KW87-QY7) as the father of Terrie Lee. Both sides of the relationship are linked.
1950 census lists 'Joleen Zabriskie' as child_2 in the Kenith J Zabriskie household. I2 is Joleen Zabriskie, daughter of KW87-QY7. Name, surname, and household position match.
Relationship assertion listing Joleen Zabriskie as daughter of the head of household. I2 is Joleen Zabriskie.
Relationship assertion establishes KW87-QY7 as father of Joleen Zabriskie. Both sides of the relationship linked.
1950 census lists 'Patricia Ann Zabriskie' as child_3 in the household. I3 is Patricia Ann Zabriskie, daughter of KW87-QY7. Name, surname, and role match.
Relationship assertion listing Patricia Ann Zabriskie as daughter of Kenneth. I3 is Patricia Ann Zabriskie.
Relationship assertion establishes KW87-QY7 as father of Patricia Ann Zabriskie. Both sides linked.
Deseret News obituary is for Ruth Tolley Zabriskie, died 15 July 2008 in Nephi, Utah, age 85. KWZ7-K75 is Ruth Tolley Zabriskie, wife of KW87-QY7. Name, date, and location match exactly.
Obituary birth date 8 August 1922, Nephi, Utah — consistent with Ruth Tolley Zabriskie (KWZ7-K75).
Obituary names Hyrum Warren Tolley as Ruth's father. This parentage assertion bears on Ruth (KWZ7-K75) as the child of Hyrum Tolley.
Obituary names Bessie Rachel Whittaker Tolley as Ruth's mother. This parentage assertion bears on Ruth (KWZ7-K75) as the child of Bessie Tolley.
Obituary states Ruth married Kenneth John Zabriskie in September 1945. This marriage assertion bears on Ruth (KWZ7-K75) as one of the spouses.
The same marriage assertion (Ruth married Kenneth John Zabriskie, September 1945) also bears on Kenneth (KW87-QY7) as the other spouse.
LDS temple sealing at Manti after September 1945 civil marriage. This sealing assertion bears on Ruth (KWZ7-K75) as one of the sealed parties.
LDS temple sealing at Manti bears on Kenneth (KW87-QY7) as one of the sealed parties.
Obituary states burial was in Nephi Vine Bluff Cemetery. This burial assertion is about the deceased Ruth Tolley Zabriskie (KWZ7-K75).

Ruth's obituary names 'Terrie (Allan) Kay of Mona' as a surviving daughter. I1 is Terrie Lee Zabriskie, daughter of KW87-QY7 and KWZ7-K75, who married Allan Kay. Name, married name, and relationship all match.
The obituary identifies Terrie Kay as a surviving daughter of Ruth Tolley Zabriskie (KWZ7-K75). This relationship assertion bears on Ruth as the mother.
Obituary states Terrie (Allan) Kay resided in Mona, Utah, as of 2008. This residence assertion bears on Terrie (I1).
Obituary gives Terrie's married name as Kay (husband Allan Kay). This name assertion bears on I1 (Terrie Lee Zabriskie), identifying her married surname.
Ruth's obituary names 'Joleen Alverson of Spanish Fork' as a surviving daughter. I2 is Joleen Zabriskie, who married Curtis Alverson. Name, married surname, and relationship match.
The obituary identifies Joleen Alverson as a surviving daughter of Ruth (KWZ7-K75). This relationship assertion bears on Ruth as the mother.
Obituary states Joleen Alverson lived in Spanish Fork, Utah, as of 2008. This residence assertion bears on Joleen (I2).
Obituary gives Joleen's married name as Alverson (husband Curtis Alverson, predeceased). This name assertion bears on I2 (Joleen Zabriskie).
Ruth's obituary names 'Ken (Melinda) Zabriskie of Draper' as a surviving son. I4 is Ken Zabriskie, son of KW87-QY7 and KWZ7-K75. Name, surname, and relationship match.
The obituary identifies Ken Zabriskie as a surviving son of Ruth (KWZ7-K75). This relationship assertion bears on Ruth as the mother.
Obituary states Ken (Melinda) Zabriskie lived in Draper, Utah, as of 2008. This residence assertion bears on Ken (I4).
Obituary names Ken's wife as Melinda. This spouse assertion bears on Ken (I4), identifying his wife.

Ruth's obituary states she was 'preceded in death by daughter Patricia Zabriskie.' I3 is Patricia Ann Zabriskie, confirmed deceased 3 December 1970 by Find a Grave and BillionGraves. Name and daughter relationship match.
The obituary records that Ruth (KWZ7-K75) was preceded in death by daughter Patricia. This relationship assertion bears on Ruth as the mother.
The 'preceded in death' clause in Ruth's 2008 obituary establishes that Patricia (I3) died before 15 July 2008. Corroborated by Find a Grave and BillionGraves showing death 3 December 1970.

Find a Grave (QVKN-LSD4) for Patricia Ann Zabriskie: born 21 December 1948, buried Vine Bluff Cemetery, Nephi, Juab, Utah. I3 is Patricia Ann Zabriskie. Name, birth date, and burial location match exactly.
Find a Grave shows Patricia Ann Zabriskie died 3 December 1970. I3 is Patricia Ann Zabriskie. Death date corroborated by BillionGraves.
Find a Grave shows burial at Vine Bluff Cemetery, Nephi, Juab, Utah. I3 is Patricia Ann Zabriskie. Corroborates obituary and BillionGraves burial location.

Find a Grave (QVKN-LSDW) for Kenneth John Zabriskie: born 30 October 1916, buried Nephi, Juab, Utah. KW87-QY7 is John Kenneth Zabriskie (b.30 Oct 1916). Name, birth date, and burial location match exactly.
Find a Grave shows Kenneth John Zabriskie died 31 January 1985. KW87-QY7's documented death date is 31 January 1985. Exact match.
Find a Grave shows burial at Vine Bluff Cemetery, Nephi, Juab, Utah. KW87-QY7 is Kenneth Zabriskie of Nephi. Burial location consistent.
BillionGraves (2HXB-BKJ) for Patricia Ann Zabriskie: born 21 December 1948, buried Nephi, Juab, Utah. I3 is Patricia Ann Zabriskie. Corroborates Find a Grave name, birth date, and location.
BillionGraves shows Patricia Ann Zabriskie died 3 December 1970. I3 is Patricia Ann Zabriskie. Corroborates Find a Grave death date.
BillionGraves shows burial in Nephi, Juab, Utah. I3 is Patricia Ann Zabriskie. Corroborates Find a Grave burial location.

proof_summaries.exhaustive_search_summary: Searched: 1950 U.S. Federal Census (FamilySearch, derivative index, ARK 6XKM-FRX3); Ruth Tolley Zabriskie 2008 obituary (Deseret News, preserved as LifeSketch in tree); Find a Grave index for Patricia Ann Zabriskie (QVKN-LSD4) and Kenneth John Zabriskie (QVKN-LSDW); BillionGraves index for Patricia Ann Zabriskie (2HXB-BKJ); FamilySearch full-text search for Kenneth's 1985 obituary (coverage gap confirmed for Utah newspapers 1984–1990); FamilySearch indexed obituary collection 2302011 (does not extend to 1985); LDS Church Census records 1950–1960 (individual-level only, not informative for household composition); Utah birth records 1945–1965 (not indexed online, 100-year privacy restriction); Utah death records 1984–1986 (FamilySearch collection ends 1966); Juab County probate records 1985–1992 (FamilySearch, two searches, zero results — not indexed online, pursued-and-unavailable). Not accessible: 1960 U.S. Census (closed until 2032 under 72-year rule); Kenneth's 1985 Utah death certificate (requires in-person Utah Division of Archives request); children's individual Utah birth certificates (100-year privacy restriction); Juab County Fourth District Court probate file (not digitized or indexed, in-person court request required).
proof_summaries.narrative_markdown:
## Children of John Kenneth Zabriskie and Ruth Tolley Zabriskie, Nephi, Juab, Utah

**Research Question:** What children are documented for John Kenneth Zabriskie (1916–1985) of Nephi, Juab, Utah, in U.S. census records, Utah vital records, obituaries, and other contemporary sources?

**Tier: Probable | Form: Summary**

---

John Kenneth Zabriskie (b. 30 October 1916, Mt. Pleasant, Sanpete, Utah; d. 31 January 1985, Nephi, Juab, Utah) and his wife Ruth Tolley Zabriskie (b. 8 August 1922, Nephi, Utah; d. 15 July 2008, Nephi, Utah; married September 1945) are documented by two independent source types as the parents of four children: Terrie Lee, Joleen, Patricia Ann, and Ken Zabriskie.

### 1950 U.S. Federal Census

The household of “Kenith J Zabriskie” — a documented spelling variant of John Kenneth Zabriskie — enumerated at Nephi, Juab, Utah, on 1 April 1950, included wife “Ruth T Zabriskie” and three daughters: **Terrie Lee Zabriskie** (b. ca. 1945, Utah), **Joleen Zabriskie** (b. ca. 1947, Utah), and **Patricia Ann Zabriskie** (b. ca. 1949, Utah). The enumerator’s direct recording of the household constitutes primary information; the household-member relationship designations are direct evidence of parentage. The FamilySearch derivative index (ark:/61903/1:1:6XKM-FRX3) was accessed; the original population schedule image was not directly examined. Source classification: derivative source, primary information, direct evidence. [a_002–a_007]

### Ruth Tolley Zabriskie 2008 Obituary

The Deseret News obituary of Ruth Tolley Zabriskie, published 17 July 2008 (Salt Lake City, Utah), names four children: “Terrie (Allan) Kay of Mona” (daughter), “Joleen Alverson of Spanish Fork” (daughter), “Ken (Melinda) Zabriskie of Draper” (son), and “Patricia Zabriskie” (daughter, preceded in death). The obituary corroborates all three daughters named in the 1950 census and uniquely documents Ken Zabriskie, born after the April 1950 census date. Source classification: authored source, secondary information, direct evidence for child-of relationship (informant: unnamed family member, family_not_present). [a_015–a_025]

### Cemetery Records — Patricia Ann Zabriskie

The FamilySearch Find a Grave index (ark:/61903/1:1:QVKN-LSD4) and BillionGraves index (ark:/61903/1:1:2HXB-BKJ) both record Patricia Ann Zabriskie born 21 December 1948, died 3 December 1970, buried Vine Bluff Cemetery, Nephi, Juab, Utah. These derivative records confirm her birth year (consistent with the 1950 census age, accounting for normal rounding), her death before her mother (as stated in the obituary), and her connection to Nephi. The two cemetery indexes likely derive from the same gravestone inscription and therefore constitute one evidence unit, not two independent proofs. Source classification: derivative source, secondary information, direct evidence for vital events. [a_026–a_034]

### Source Gaps and Limitations

Kenneth Zabriskie’s own 1985 obituary was not located in any online collection. FamilySearch full-text search confirmed a coverage gap for Utah newspapers ca. 1984–1990; the indexed “Utah, Obituaries from Utah Newspapers, 1850–2005” collection does not extend to 1985. The 1960 U.S. Census is closed until 2032 under the federal 72-year rule. Utah birth certificates for the children (ca. 1945–1965) are subject to a 100-year privacy restriction and are not available online. Kenneth’s 1985 Utah death certificate requires an in-person request to the Utah Division of Archives and Records Service. These are pursued-and-unavailable resources, not unsearched gaps.

### Evidence Weighing and Correlation

Terrie Lee, Joleen, and Patricia Ann are each documented by two independent source types: an original record with primary information (1950 census) and an authored source with secondary information (2008 obituary). Patricia is additionally corroborated by two cemetery indexes. This cross-source convergence — different record types, different informants, different creation dates — provides a strong evidentiary basis for their identification as children of John Kenneth Zabriskie.

Ken Zabriskie presents a different situation: he is documented solely by the 2008 obituary. The 1960 census (which would likely have shown him in the household) is inaccessible until 2032. While the obituary’s description is specific (“Ken (Melinda) Zabriskie of Draper”) and internally consistent with the other documented children, single-source documentation meets only a probable tier under the GPS standard. No record contradicts his inclusion in the family.

No conflicts were identified across any of the sources examined.

### Conclusion

At a **probable** tier, John Kenneth Zabriskie and Ruth Tolley Zabriskie of Nephi, Juab, Utah, had four documented children:

1. **Terrie Lee Zabriskie** (b. ca. 1945, Utah), later known as Terrie Kay (husband: Allan Kay), residing Mona, Juab County, Utah, as of 2008.
2. **Joleen Zabriskie** (b. ca. 1947, Utah), later known as Joleen Alverson (husband: Curtis Alverson), residing Spanish Fork, Utah County, Utah, as of 2008.
3. **Patricia Ann Zabriskie** (b. 21 December 1948; d. 3 December 1970, Nephi, Juab, Utah), buried Vine Bluff Cemetery, Nephi.
4. **Ken Zabriskie** (b. after 1 April 1950), husband of Melinda, residing Draper, Salt Lake County, Utah, as of 2008.

The conclusion could advance to **proved** if independent primary-information records corroborating Ken Zabriskie’s parentage are obtained — most likely the 1960 U.S. Census (available 2032) or Kenneth’s 1985 Utah death certificate via the Utah State Archives.
